name: landing-page
description: Iterates on landing page copy and design, tracks traffic sources, sets up analytics, creates lead-magnet pages, and maintains a design system.
author: pancake-official

agents.description: Iterates on landing page copy and messaging for optimal conversion — writes variants, A/B test briefs, and secondary lead-magnet pages.
Monitors traffic, analyses sources, sets up and maintains analytics tooling (Google Analytics, GTM, or user-specified tools).
Creates and maintains the landing page design system — tokens, components, and visual consistency guidelines.

required_identities.reason: Agents open PRs against the landing page repo (basalt-ai/pancake-landing) to ship copy changes, new pages, and design-system updates.

required_vault_secrets.label: Google Analytics Measurement ID (e.g. G-XXXXXXXXXX) — leave blank if not yet set up
Google Tag Manager Container ID (e.g. GTM-XXXXXXX) — leave blank if not yet set up or not using GTM
Preferred analytics tool (e.g. 'google_analytics', 'plausible', 'posthog', 'custom') — used by the traffic analyst
